product: Databricks SQL version 2025.35 is now available in Preview
tagline: Databricks SQL version 2025.35 is now available in the Preview channel.
what_it_does: Databricks SQL version 2025.35 is now available in the Preview channel. Review the following section to learn about new features, behavioral changes, and bug fixes. EXECUTE IMMEDIATE using constant expressions You can now pass constant expressions as the SQL string and as arguments to parameter markers in EXECUTE IMMEDIATE statements.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Databricks SQL version 2025.35 is now available in the Preview channel.
